title: VaultTimermod
description: A mod that removes all vault cool-downs and makes so that ominous vaults are reusable.
body:
This mod makes vaults reusable and removes all cooldowns on such, also ominous vaults are reusable without a cooldown. 

Write me on discord if you have suggestions for  Mods/Upgrades to this mod.

"sleethe"

The images used in the Gallery and seen as the Icon were made by AI.

TBA in 1.0.3: Make it configurable with the 'Mod Menu' mod.
